16.reason: Error: This line decrements n before it is used for array bounds and loops, causing incorrect traversal ranges. The original n should be preserved for the graph size.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: This line decrements n before it is used for array bounds and loops, causing incorrect traversal ranges. The original n should be preserved for the graph size.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: This line decrements n before it's used for array bounds, causing the graph to be treated as having n-1 vertices instead of n. The problem states vertices are 0 to n-1, so n should remain unchanged.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: n should not be decremented as it represents the total number of vertices. Modifying it causes incorrect loop bounds and potential out-of-bounds access. The traversal loops should use p < n instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The problem states vertices are labeled 0 to n-1, but here n is decremented, causing all subsequent logic to use an incorrect vertex count. This leads to missing the last vertex in traversals.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The problem states vertices are labeled 0 to n-1, but this decrements n before building the graph, causing all subsequent logic to treat the graph as having n-1 vertices instead of the actual n. This leads to incorrect traversal bounds and missing the last vertex.]

60.reason: Error: Uses n which was decremented, so the loop does not cover all original vertices (0 to original n-1). Should use original n-1.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Uses n which was decremented, so the loop does not cover all original vertices (0 to original n-1). Should use original n-1.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: The loop condition uses p<=n, but due to the earlier n--, the maximum vertex index is n-1 (original n-2). This may cause out-of-bounds access or missing vertices.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition should be p < n to correctly iterate over valid vertex indices from 0 to n-1 without accessing out-of-bounds memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Because n was decremented in main(), this loop runs from 0 to n (which is original n-1), so it misses the actual last vertex (original n-1 becomes n after decrement, but loop goes only to n which is now too small).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Because n was decremented in main(), this loop runs from 0 to n-1 (original n-2), so it never checks adjacency for the original last vertex (n-1). This causes incomplete DFS traversal.]

90.reason: Compilation error: In C89/C90 standard, declaring loop variables inside the for-loop initialization is not allowed. Declare 'p' before the loop to resolve the compilation error.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Same issue as in len; uses decremented n, missing vertices.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: Same issue as in len() - loop condition p<=n with decremented n causes incorrect traversal.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error: The loop condition should be p < n to correctly iterate over valid vertex indices from 0 to n-1 without accessing out-of-bounds memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Compilation error: In C89/C90 standard, declaring loop variables inside the for-loop initialization is not allowed. Declare 'p' before the loop to resolve the compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same issue: due to n being decremented, this BFS loop does not consider adjacency with the highest-numbered vertex (original n-1), leading to incomplete traversal.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same issue: due to n being decremented, BFS also fails to consider edges involving the original highest-numbered vertex (n-1), leading to incomplete traversal.]

78.reason: [BFS loop condition should be head < tail to avoid dequeuing an extra uninitialized element when queue is empty]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [BFS loop condition should be head < tail to avoid dequeuing an extra uninitialized element when queue is empty]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  // Error: Loop condition should be 'head < tail' to avoid processing an empty queue; using '<=' causes an extra iteration when head equals tail, leading to undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: The queue condition should be `head < tail`. Using `<=` causes an extra iteration that accesses uninitialized array elements when the queue is empty, leading to undefined behavior or runtime errors.
